metadata.summary: Various utilities for game development with pyxel game engine.

documentation:
# pyxel-utils

Various utilities for game development with the [pyxel](https://github.com/kitao/pyxel) engine.

### `blt_topleft`

Similar to `pyxel.blt`, but always places the image so that the top-left
corner of the image is at the given x, y position.

Does not support the `rotate` parameter.

### `text_centered`

Draws text horizontally centered at the given x, y position.

### Cursor showing coordinates

Shows the current mouse coordinates under the cursor.

Usage:

```python
import pyxel_utils

def update():
    pyxel_utils.cursor_update()
    ...

def draw():
    ...
    pyxel_utils.cursor_draw()
```

### `point_grid`

Draws a grid of points.

![](examples/grid.png)

Usage:

```python
import pyxel_utils

def draw():
    pyxel_utils.point_grid(10, 10, 3)
```

### `checkerboard`

Draws a checkerboard pattern.

![](examples/checkerboard.png)

Usage:

```python
import pyxel_utils

def draw():
    pyxel_utils.checkerboard(5, 9, 10)
```

functions.name: pyxel_utils.blt_topleft
documentation:
Similar to `pyxel.blt`, but always places the image so that the top-left
corner of the image is at the given x, y position.

Does not support the `rotate` parameter.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.cursor_visible
documentation: Sets the visibility of the cursor.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.cursor_update
documentation:
Toggles the visibility of the cursor when the given key is pressed.

:param int toggle_key: The key that toggles the cursor visibility.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.cursor_draw
documentation:
The cursor is a small circle with the current mouse position displayed
next to it.

:param int col_bg: The color of the background behind the cursor position text.
:param int col_fg: The color of the cursor position text.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.text_centered
documentation: Draws text horizontally centered at the given x, y position.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.point_grid
documentation: Draw a grid of points with the given padding and color.

functions.name: pyxel_utils.checkerboard
documentation: Draw a checkerboard pattern with the given size and colors.
